name: Fire Drill
description: The Fire Drill is an unused effervescent variant concept tied to the Infinity family, effectively mirroring a fire themed Infinity style weapon.

special.description: Always deals incendiary damage. Does not consume ammo and has a fixed magazine size of 1. Fires in a fixed shot pattern that ignores normal recoil. 100 percent status effect chance. Higher damage. Better accuracy while aiming down sights. Reduced fire rate.
special.title: It gets the job done.

notes:
Uses the Infinity model with the effervescent skin.

Originally planned as Lt. Angvar's effervescent drop, but it was cut before release and he drops the Infinity instead.
